description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark, smooth material that appears to be leather or high-quality faux leather. The sofa features three main seat sections and an extended chaise lounge on the right side, providing ample seating space and a comfortable lounging area. The backrest is straight and segmented into three distinct cushions, each matching the seat cushions in size and style. The armrests are low, straight, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the overall rectangular profile of the sofa. The legs are thin, black, and slightly recessed, giving the sofa a floating appearance and contributing to its contemporary aesthetic. The upholstery is solid in color with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a clean and sophisticated look suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, dark-colored sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, straight padded armrests, and thin recessed legs. The design is sleek, minimalist, and upholstered in smooth leather or faux leather.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sofa, three seat cushions, a right-side chaise lounge, and straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the low, straight armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, segmented backrest and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, emphasizing the chaise lounge extension and the sofa's clean, rectangular profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, with a right-side chaise lounge extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, straight, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the sofa's rectangular profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six thin, black, metal legs, slightly recessed and positioned at the corners and under the chaise for support, giving a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height, segmented backrest with three attached cushions, matching the seat cushions in width and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark color with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
